noHiddenFees.title: No Hidden Fees

clearConditions.title: Clear Conditions
clearConditions.description: Cancellation and change rules are confirmed per offer

booking.specialRequestsPlaceholder: Dates flexibility, children ages, room preferences, flight needs...
booking.bookingInProgressBody: Submitting saves your booking in the system. Link Travel will contact you by phone, and online payment is not charged yet.
booking.termsAcknowledgement: I confirm that my guest details are correct and I accept Link Travel's
booking.termsTail: the offer-specific cancellation/payment rules. I understand payment is handled directly with the agency until online payment is implemented.
booking.savedNotice: Your booking will be saved as in progress. When admin confirms it, you will receive a confirmed booking email.
booking.infoNoticeBody: Your booking is saved first. Link Travel confirms availability, final price, and payment details by phone.
booking.noOnlinePayment: No online payment. Agency confirms final price and payment steps.
booking.emptyChooseBody: Start from a hotel room or package before continuing to booking.
booking.hotelNotFoundBody: We could not load this hotel for booking. Please start again from the hotels page.
booking.packageNotFoundBody: We could not load this package for booking. Please start again from the packages page.
booking.roomNotAvailableBody: The selected room could not be loaded. Please choose another room for this hotel.
booking.completeFirst: Please complete your booking details first.

bookingConfirmation.notFoundBody: We could not load a reservation from local session state.
bookingConfirmation.title: Reservation Received!
bookingConfirmation.subtitleBefore: Your reservation request has been saved successfully. Our team will contact
bookingConfirmation.subtitleAfter: to confirm availability, final price, and payment steps.
bookingConfirmation.quotedTotalNote: This is an estimated quote for the request. No online payment has been collected.

important.p1: Link Travel will contact you before the reservation is treated as confirmed
important.p2: A valid ID or passport is required for all guests
important.p3: Payment is not collected online and must be arranged directly with the agency
important.p4: Changes, cancellation rules, and deadlines follow the official travel conditions and the selected offer

contact.title: Contact Link Travel
contact.subtitle: For Istanbul, Albania, Tunisia, and other seasonal offers, write to us directly. Our team will reply with a current price and availability.
contact.moreQuestionsBody: Contact us directly for the latest offer. Prices are current and may change with date and availability.
contact.sentBody: Thank you. Link Travel will contact you with a current price and next steps.
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us the destination, date, number of people, and the hotel if you've chosen one…
contact.successToast: Your message has been sent successfully.
contact.errorToast: Failed to send your message. Please try again.

form.name: Name
form.subject: Subject
form.successBody: We received your message and will be in touch shortly.
form.errorTitle: We could not send your message
form.errorBody: Please try again later, or reach us directly by phone or email.

about.title: About LinkTravel
about.subtitle: Current offers, personal service, and fast bookings from Gostivar.
about.intro: LinkTravel curates destinations, hotels, and packages tailored to travelers from North Macedonia, Albania, Kosovo, and the wider region. Every reservation is followed up personally — by phone, WhatsApp, or in our office.
about.ctaTitle: Plan your next trip with us

story.p1: Link Travel is an agency that communicates directly, quickly, and clearly. We focus on real offers, current prices, and personal help for every client looking for a vacation, hotel, or flight.
story.p2: From Istanbul to the Albanian Riviera and seasonal Tunisia offers, our presentation is based on concrete information: departure dates, the type of service, what's included, and how you can book right away.
story.p3: Our strength is the close contact with the client — by phone, WhatsApp, Viber, or email — so that a request becomes a confirmed reservation as quickly as possible.

values.title: Our Values
values.subtitle: The principles that guide everything we do at LinkTravel

passion.title: Passion for Travel
passion.description: We believe travel transforms lives and creates lasting memories.

trust.title: Trust & Reliability
trust.description: Your safety and satisfaction are our top priorities.

personal.title: Personalized Service
personal.description: Every journey is tailored to your unique preferences.

excellence.title: Excellence
excellence.description: We partner only with the best hotels and service providers.

customerFirst.title: Customer-first Support
customerFirst.description: Responsive guidance before and after booking

regional.title: Regional Expertise
regional.description: Focused knowledge of destinations across the region

policy.title: Travel Policy
policy.subtitle: How reservations, payments, and cancellations work at Link Travel.
policy.heroSubtitle: These terms explain how travel requests, confirmations, changes, cancellations, documents, and agency follow-up are handled. The PDF is the official policy document.
policy.noticeBody: Link Travel currently uses this website for reservation requests only. No card payment or online payment is collected here.
policy.needHelpBody: If a traveler has questions about the terms, final price, payment deadline, documents, or cancellation rules, they should contact Link Travel before paying.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.subtitle: The page you were looking for does not exist or has moved.
